spec_match.rationale: The support probes still cover all seven media element pseudo-classes with CSS.supports('selector(...)').

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP in Chrome Canary played the local audio fixture, observed advancing currentTime with audio:playing, paused it to audio:paused, and toggled mute/unmute with the CSS badges and diagnostic line updating correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The live demo remains a CSS-only playing, paused, and muted indicator tied to a real audio element.

edge_cases.rationale: The local MP3 decoded cleanly, selector parse failures remain handled, and Chrome DevTools MCP reported no console errors or failed network requests.

references.rationale: The page includes ChromeStatus and Selectors Level 4 references.

design_system.rationale: The touched status badges now use design-system colors instead of raw white text.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP verified play, pause, mute, unmute, CSS-only state badges, and clean console/network output for the local CC0 audio fixture.
